# CWE-426 positive: plugin path from request query (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-426-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"path/filepath"
	"plugin"
)

func LoadExtension(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	searchRoot := r.URL.Query().Get("plugin_dir")
	_ = os.Setenv("PATH", searchRoot+string(os.PathListSeparator)+os.Getenv("PATH"))
	modPath := filepath.Join(searchRoot, r.PathValue("name")+".so")
	p, err := plugin.Open(modPath)
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	sym, err := p.Lookup("Init")
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return
	}
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	_ = sym
}
